rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §12.136 governs posting of charter school CEO salaries. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: An open-enrollment charter school shall post on the school's Internet website the salary of the school's superintendent or, as applicable, of the administrator serving as educational leader and chief executive officer.
_note: No relationship between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change and Educ. Code §12.136; rule addresses charter school salary disclosure only.
